questions.scenario: A customer should download one private receipt PDF without receiving bucket credentials. Which pattern fits?

options.text: A short-lived signed URL for that object.
Copy the file into Cloud SQL.

questions.explanation: A signed URL can grant temporary access to a specific object operation.

questions.scenario: A signed URL is valid for seven days and points to the wrong support attachment. What is the risk?

options.text: The access mistake travels with the link while it is valid.
The bucket becomes a SQL database.

questions.explanation: Signed URLs should be narrow in object, method, and expiration.

questions.scenario: Which properties should a signed URL design specify?

options.text: A permanent broad IAM role for the user.

questions.explanation: Signed URLs should be tightly scoped.
